description:
Update Your Software Instantly to Keep All Software at Best

IObit Software Updater is a user-friendly tool designed to keep your software up-to-date and secure. It scans for outdated programs and updates them with one click, reducing vulnerabilities and improving performance. With a large software database, it also helps you find and install essential applications.
v9.0 (2026-07-15)
- Larger Software Database – Keeps over 1,100 popular programs up to date, including cutting-edge AI tools, security suites, multimedia software, various utilities, and more
- More Reliable Update – Automatically routes downloads through the fastest and most stable sources (including IObit's official mirror server)
- Smoother Auto Update – Updates software instantly and silently, without disturbing you
- One-Click Bulk Installation – Batch installs must-have apps on a new/reinstalled PC to save your time and efforts
- Better Localization – Improved 36 localized languages for a smoother native experience
- General Improvements – Dozens of minor UI enhancements, stability tweaks, and performance optimizations
